captured_by: sampler (Phase-2 SAMPLE re-attestation 2026-07-06: independently re-verified representativeness — typical/amendment/edge/diversity coverage confirmed, all 5 sha256 re-derived and matched, politeness settings confirmed consistent; original capture facts below are historical and unchanged) + test-designer (goal 001 T8b) — expected.*.json derived INDEPENDENTLY of any parser, per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md (auto-resolved expected outputs; auditor cross-check follows in T8d)

sampler_attestation.attested_by: sampler role, Phase-2 SAMPLE re-attestation (E1 role-eval calibration, docs/decisions/role-eval-thresholds.md)
sampler_attestation.representativeness_review: Confirmed the 5 cases genuinely cover the Phase-2 gate's typical/amendment/edge-case bar: typical_single_row = typical (single-row, blank owner); amendment_unlinked = required amendment/correction case (NOT skipped — carries an amended row with prior-year transaction date and an unlinked supersession that opens a review_task); scanned_paper_ptr = edge case (scanned/image-only PDF, no text layer per the xpdf pdftotext probe, forces the LLM-extraction path rather than the text parser). multi_row_sp_vehicle (8 rows across 2 pages, page break falls between rows with no cell join) and sp_owner_options (SP-owner/options asset type, 2 rows) add further shape diversity beyond the minimum 3. No case looked cherry-picked for convenience: the 'easiest'-looking case (typical_single_row) is deliberately the simple baseline the typical slot calls for, not a substitute for a harder required case, and the two hardest cases (amendment_unlinked, scanned_paper_ptr) are both present and unmodified.
sampler_attestation.sha256_rederivation: Independently recomputed sha256 of all 5 fixtures/<case>/input.pdf via sha256sum and compared byte-for-byte against this manifest's declared sha256 values: typical_single_row 4a12b888c2c89ebbfad5c280fa8a6af52489218dbec402ca2abc803436d8fa3f MATCH; multi_row_sp_vehicle 5b1b60bea609310f4288adce9557702231cd1f23eb5ceabf1c0babc3fe867b37 MATCH; amendment_unlinked 0a5861a182db417541f62a0179dfbba025d06cf1aa990c4d1931a2076760af1e MATCH; sp_owner_options 90bf98e6a2a3685f429964bb0e154ae05cc99423227b94666012332b81dc821e MATCH; scanned_paper_ptr 2f4b2b6e98e044e6368a072275804bc61dda52f6f1e15c09ddb9074ea1b8952c MATCH. All 5/5 matched; no bytes altered.
sampler_attestation.politeness_review: Top-level politeness block (user_agent 'govfolio.io research (contact: ssm.leo@outlook.com)', concurrency 1, min_interval_seconds 2, requests_this_capture 5) matches this project's standing convention used elsewhere this session (scout/surveyor). Nested scanned_paper_ptr.capture.politeness (11 requests, itemized breakdown of conditional/full index GETs, HEADs, and one PDF GET) is consistent with the same UA/concurrency/interval convention and is out of scope for edits (already a correct historical record per goal 021).

spec: docs/regimes/us-house.md (silver §4, details §5, mapping tables §3, fixture selection §7)

multi_row_sp_vehicle.notes: 2 pages; page break falls between rows 6 and 7 — no asset cell joins across it, so no page-break confidence penalty applies

amendment_unlinked.notes: amended row: row_id 2000152831, FILING STATUS Amended, prior-year transaction date; supersession stays NULL and promotion (Task 11) opens review_task ptr_amendment_unlinked — outside GoldCandidate, so not asserted here

capture.captured_by: test-designer (goal 021 first leg, commit 77740d8) — expected.*.json transcribed INDEPENDENTLY from VISUAL page renders (two engines: native PDF read + WinRT Windows.Data.Pdf at 4x with region crops; all cells agree), parser/LLM-blind per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md; entry applied here verbatim by the goal 021 second-leg builder together with the E1 lock v2 supersede

politeness.breakdown: 1 conditional index GET (304 — E1 ETag still current) + 1 full index GET (byte-identical to E1 pin e5419282df7a96daa8aed108b72072a57bf909bb2a6c6333c938144f6898ba0d) + 8 HEADs sizing paper candidates + 1 PDF GET; no incidents

scanned_paper_ptr.llm_path: This case MUST run through the goal 021 LLM-extraction seam (us-house.md §6.3), never the text parser: the scan has no text layer. The extraction cache entry ships with this fixture as extraction.cache.json — primed MECHANICALLY from expected.silver.json (test-designer ground truth 77740d8) via pipeline::extraction::prime_from_expected_silver, NOT a live LLM call; equality with the ground truth is enforced by `cargo test -p pipeline extraction`. The expecteds stay renderer-transcribed ground truth.
scanned_paper_ptr.filer: Hon. Diana Harshbarger (TN01) — index Prefix 'Hon.'; the paper form NAME line reads 'Diana Harshbarger' WITHOUT the honorific (paper caveat to the §2.5 verbatim-alias rule)
scanned_paper_ptr.text_layer_probe: xpdf pdftotext 4.06 exits 0 and emits exactly 1 byte — a lone form-feed page separator, zero text characters. Text layer ABSENT; that absence is why this is the LLM-fallback case.

paper_form_conventions.doc_id: the paper form prints NO Filing ID anywhere; ground truth doc_id = index DocID 9115811. The extractor cannot OCR it — the builder threads it from pipeline context (FilingRef.external_id); in conformance mode the cache priming carries it.
paper_form_conventions.filer_status_raw: 'Member' from the checked 'Member of the U.S. House of Representatives' box ('Officer or Employee' unchecked); electronic vocabulary
paper_form_conventions.state_district_raw: 'TN01' composed from form fields State: TN + District: 1 (state + 2-digit zero-padded district = index StateDst format)
paper_form_conventions.transaction_type_raw: 'P' from the X in the Purchase column; paper checkbox columns map to the electronic token vocabulary: Purchase->P, Sale->S, Partial Sale->S (partial), Exchange->E
paper_form_conventions.amount_raw: '$15,001 - $50,000' (band_table canonical string) from the X in amount column B; the paper column header prints '$15,001-$50,000' without spaces around the hyphen
paper_form_conventions.filing_status_raw: 'New' from the checked 'Initial Report' box ('Amendment' unchecked, 'Date of Report Being Amended' blank); electronic vocabulary New/Amended
paper_form_conventions.asset_type_code_raw: null — the paper form has no [XX] asset-type code (instructs 'Provide full name, not ticker symbol'); per SAF §3.6 missing code => gold asset_class 'other'. FLAGGED: the cell literally says 'Municipal Bond'; if the LLM contract later maps explicit paper asset-text to classes, update the SAF first, then these expecteds.
paper_form_conventions.cap_gains_over_200: null — the paper form has no Cap. Gains column at all
paper_form_conventions.signed_date_raw: '2026 MAY -6' verbatim from the clerk received stamp (HAND DELIVERED / LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER) — the paper form has NO signature/date block anywhere on the page; the stamp is the only in-document filing date and equals index FilingDate 5/6/2026. FLAGGED CONVENTION for builder + auditor: a received date standing in for a signed date; gold details.signed_date parses it to 2026-05-06.
paper_form_conventions.confidence: 0.9 as f32 (design §5.3 confidence-scored LLM extraction; design §7 sampled spot-check band 0.8-0.95). Same serde f32->f64 convention as the T8b cases (confidence_literal below): JSON literal 0.8999999761581421 is the exact f64 image of 0.9f32 — do not 'fix' it.
paper_form_conventions.extractor: 'us_house_ptr/llm@1' — the LLM-path extractor tag (text path stays 'us_house_ptr/text@1')

uncertain_cells: asset_raw line 2 'DI SR C RV BE/R/, Municipal Bond': the 'BE/R/,' glyph cluster is the least crisp run on the scan; both render passes read 'BE/R/' + comma — transcribed as best reading, UNCERTAIN punctuation only (letters are unambiguous)
scanned_paper_ptr.non_contract_annotations: handwritten office telephone 202-225-6356 with clerk initials (reads 'MC'); handwritten '2 of 2' beside the pre-printed 'Page 1 of ___' (fax/bundle pagination — the PDF itself is a single page); HAND DELIVERED stamp

conformance_conventions.silver_shape: expected.silver.json is the serialization of Vec<pipeline StagingRow>: [{payload, confidence}]. payload carries every docs/regimes/us-house.md §4 field EXCEPT confidence, which lives at the wrapper's top-level `confidence` (f32) — no duplication inside payload.
conformance_conventions.confidence_literal: All rows score 1.00 - 0.02 (cap_gains_over_200 null, §6 v1 constant) = 0.98 as f32. serde_json 1.0.150 Value-serializes f32 via `N::Float(f as f64)` (raw cast), so the JSON literal is 0.9800000190734863 — the exact f64 image of 0.98f32. Do NOT 'fix' the literals to 0.98; fix nothing unless serde_json changes its f32 cast behavior.
conformance_conventions.details_nulls: Optional details fields are serialized as explicit nulls (no skip_serializing_if) so the (regime, record_type) contract surface is fully visible in every candidate.

conformance_ids.rationale: The PDF carries no ULIDs and conformance runs with pool: None, so filing/politician/regime ids cannot be resolved from a roster. These fixed Crockford-valid ULID constants are the contract the adapter must emit in conformance mode (production resolves real ids from Postgres). Filing ids embed the DocID digits for auditability.
conformance_ids.paper_alias_note: the scanned_paper_ptr politician key is the paper form's NAME line verbatim — no 'Hon.' prefix on paper filings (quirks log 2026-07-05); pool-backed runs resolve it via the roster's prefix-less canonical alias

evidence: index slice + retrieval metadata: docs/regimes/us-house/evidence/ (2026FD.zip sha256 e5419282df7a96daa8aed108b72072a57bf909bb2a6c6333c938144f6898ba0d re-verified against the E1 pin at capture time; ETag "3e8597f0ebadd1:0" unchanged)
